question: Write a C++ program that repeatedly prompts the user to enter an integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive) until a valid input is provided. Use a `do-while` loop for input validation.

test_cases.expected:
Enter an integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive): Input out of range. Please enter a number between 1 and 10.
Enter an integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive): Input out of range. Please enter a number between 1 and 10.
Enter an integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive): Input out of range. Please enter a number between 1 and 10.
Enter an integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive): Invalid input. Please enter an integer.
Enter an integer between 1 and 10 (inclusive): You entered: 5. Valid input!
